title: Performium: Continued
description: This modpack is a fork of Performium, a performance modpack
body:
[![Performium](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ImKarven/Performium-Continued/refs/heads/main/assets/performium_banner.png)](https://github.com/ImKarven/Performium-Continued)

# About Performium: Continued
**Performium: Continued** is a fork of the archived [Performium](https://modrinth.com/modpack/performium-was-taken) modpack for continuing support for new Minecraft versions.

# About Performium
**Performium** is a lightweight, optimized Fabric-based modpack designed to enhance your Minecraft experience with stunning visuals, seamless textures, and quality-of-life improvements—all while maintaining excellent performance.


# Features
✅ **Enhanced Visuals** – Stunning shaders, connected textures, and refined models.   
✅ **Optimized Gameplay** – Smooth mouse controls and performance tweaks.   
✅ **Minimalist Approach** – Never over **50 mods** for efficiency.   
✅ **Broad Compatibility** – Supports **Minecraft 26.1.2+** and works with:  
   - 🟢 **Windows**
   - 🟢 **Debian-based Linux Distros** 
   - 🟢 **Modrinth App**
   - 🟢 **Prism Launcher**

Always use the latest **Performium: Continued** version for the best experience.
For older Minecraft versions (below 26.1.2), use the original [Performium](https://modrinth.com/modpack/performium-was-taken) modpack.

# Installation (Modrinth App)
1. **Download & Install** the [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app).
2. **Login** with your Minecraft account.
3. **Browse** on the left sidebar.
4. **Search** for Performium: Continued.
5. **Download & Install** the first result.


# Versioning System
Performium: Continued follows a structured versioning format:
```
v[ModpackVersion]-[Stage]+[Build]
```

## Example Versions
- `v1.0.0-Alpha+1` – Fist alpha build of version 1.0.0
- `v1.0.0-Beta+1` – First beta build of version 1.0.0
- `v1.0.0-Release+1` – First stable build of version 1.0.0

## Breakdown
- **v[ModpackVersion]** → Uses **Semantic Versioning** (MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH)
- **[Stage]** → Alpha, Beta, or Release
- **[Build]** → Build Number for each Version

# Support & Community
No support will be offered at this time.
